title: ThaumicThermae
description: Thaumcraft 4 add-on that provides a golem core to apply Sanitizing Soap
body:
This Thaumcraft 4 add-on provides just a Golem Core named Sanitize, which can make the golem help you to use Sanitizing Soap automatically. 

dependency: gadomancy

The only research can be found in the Golemancy Category.

Source code can be found there: [https://github.com/Watware/ThuamicThermae](https://github.com/Watware/ThuamicThermae)
